banner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site. Essential cookies are always enabled. You can accept all cookies, reject them, or manage your preferences.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.description: Enable or disable each cookie category. Essential cookies cannot be disabled.

essential.label: Essential
essential.description: These cookies are essential for the site to function properly. They cannot be disabled.

functional.label: Functional
functional.description: These cookies remember your preferences, such as your theme or language.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how you use our site so we can improve it.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies are used to show you personalized content and relevant ads.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your {appName} password
resetPassword.heading: Password reset
resetPassword.body: You requested to reset your password on {appName}. Click the button below to create a new password.
resetPassword.expiry: This link expires in 1 hour. If you did not request this reset, you can ignore this email.
resetPassword.fallbackIntro: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:

welcome.subject: Verify your {appName} email address
welcome.preview: Welcome to {appName} - Verify your email address
welcome.heading: Welcome to {appName}!
welcome.body: Thanks for signing up on {appName}. To activate your account and access all features, please confirm your email address by clicking the button below.
welcome.expiry: This link expires in 24 hours. If you did not create an account on {appName}, you can ignore this email.
welcome.fallbackIntro: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:

passwordChanged.subject: Your {appName} password has been changed
passwordChanged.heading: Password changed
passwordChanged.body: We confirm that your {appName} password has been changed successfully.
passwordChanged.warningIntro: If you did not make this change, please immediately
passwordChanged.footer: This email was sent automatically following a change to your password. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

emailChangeNotification.subject: Email address change requested on {appName}
emailChangeNotification.heading: Email address change requested
emailChangeNotification.body: A request to change your email address on {appName} has been submitted. This change will only take effect after the new address is verified.
emailChangeNotification.warningIntro: If you did not make this request, please immediately
emailChangeNotification.footer: This email was sent automatically following an email address change request. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

organizationInvitation.subject: Invitation to join {organizationName} on {appName}
organizationInvitation.heading: You have been invited to join {organizationName}
organizationInvitation.body: {inviterName} ({inviterEmail}) invites you to join the organization {organizationName} on {appName} as {role}.
organizationInvitation.expiry: Click the button below to accept the invitation. This link is valid for 48 hours.
organizationInvitation.ignore: If you were not expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.
organizationInvitation.fallbackIntro: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:

paymentFailed.subject: Payment failed for {organizationName} on {appName}
paymentFailed.preview: A recent payment for {organizationName} could not be processed
paymentFailed.heading: Payment failed
paymentFailed.body: We were unable to process the latest payment for {organizationName} on {appName}. Please update your payment method to avoid any interruption of service.
paymentFailed.fallbackIntro: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:

seatLimitExceeded.subject: {organizationName} has exceeded its seat limit on {appName}
seatLimitExceeded.preview: {organizationName} now has more members than its plan allows
seatLimitExceeded.heading: Your organization has exceeded its seat limit
seatLimitExceeded.body: {organizationName} now has {memberCount, plural, one {# member} other {# members}}, which is over the {seatCap, plural, one {# seat} other {# seats}} included in its current plan on {appName}.
seatLimitExceeded.noRemoval: No member has been removed and none will be automatically. However, you won't be able to add new members until you upgrade your plan or remove members to get back within your seat limit.
seatLimitExceeded.fallbackIntro: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:

accountDeleted.subject: Your {appName} account has been deleted
accountDeleted.heading: Account deleted
accountDeleted.body: We confirm that your {appName} account has been deleted successfully. All your associated data has been permanently deleted.
accountDeleted.comeBack: If you ever want to come back to {appName}, you can create a new account at any time.
accountDeleted.warningIntro: If you did not request this deletion or have any questions, please
accountDeleted.footer: This email was sent automatically following the deletion of your account. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

contact.subject: New message from {name}: {subject}
contact.heading: New contact message
contact.footer: You can reply directly to this email to contact {name}.
